item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
that's so cool, how do you even make something like that?
guess they hit the space bar by accident
what am i missing here?
yes indeed it is
i plan on doing this.
as is tradition
why are the earths kissing?
mmm hmm
ugh, that show is always on
fair warning
i kinda want it
wait what
no thank you?
don't talk so loud she's listening
those hats need to make a comeback
please
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Siskel and Ebert's transformation about Jim Carrey
item.description: Have you ever wanted to try D&D but never found a good way to do it or have wanted a little more D&D in your life? I'm part of a great D&D Discord server that is safe, inclusive, and open to veterans and newbies alike. We have text-only games and voice games for all levels of character and player experience, mostly one-shots but some longer campaigns, as well. If you would like to check us out, the link is below. You can come and make whatever character you want, play in games, roleplay in our inn, or just chat out-of-character with likeminded people in a chill and accepting environment. https://discord.gg/forgotten-lands
item.dc:creator: adjacentengels

We have text-only games and voice games for all levels of character and player experience, mostly one-shots but some longer campaigns, as well. If you would like to check us out, the link is below. You can come and make whatever character you want, play in games, roleplay in our inn, or just chat out-of-character with likeminded people in a chill and accepting environment. https://discord.gg/forgotten-lands

item.title: Anne Frank's father, Otto, visits the attic where they hid from the Germans in World War II. He stands alone as he is the only member of his family to have survived the Holocaust, 1960.

item.title: Images of Note: hey im furby
item.description:
Jesus!
Judging by some of the designs, it might be Pictish
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
always I wanna be with you, make believe with you and live in harmony, harmony, oh love!
ngl that goes hard.
it autism
oh shit
I see them everywhere
'Atsuneh Mikoo
dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance dance
:D
The 80s was a wild time.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: in PJ vs in Cosplay - Ada Wong cosplay by YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/p/DATvipzSzpe https://x.com/YuzuPyonCosplay/status/1838635621189058900 A little side by side of my Ada Wong cosplay transformation! Left side is no make up pj me, right is the final look. I recorded an Ada Wong make up tutorial video, should I post it ? For those curious, this awesome shirt is from Fakku. Men need love too! :) -yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Fuck around, find out.
item.description: Conspiracy theorist Alex Jones ' Infowars media platform and its assets will be sold off piece by piece in auctions this fall to help pay the more than $1 billion he owes relatives of victims of the Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting, under an order expected to be approved by a federal judge. U.S. Bankruptcy Judge Christopher Lopez in Houston said during a court hearing Tuesday that he will approve the auctions that start in November. But he said he first must change a previous order to make it clear that the trustee overseeing Jones’ personal bankruptcy case controls all the assets of Infowars parent company Free Speech Systems, which is owned 100% by Jones.
item.dc:creator: plinkey

item.title: The Man of the Hole. The last of the Tanaru.
item.description: This guy had his whole tribe killed off my mercenaries hired by cattle ranchers. He lived alone until his death in 2022, attacking anyone who came near. "It is not known what language the Man of the Hole spoke, what his people called themselves, or what his name was." Fucking legend. Hope you found your peace. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Man_of_the_Hole
item.dc:creator: baals

item.title: The state just committed murder
item.description:
No evidence whatsoever connecting this man to the crime, a murder that took place in 1998. His DNA was not at the scene. His fingerprints were not on the murder weapon. There was plenty of trace evidence at the scene, but none of it belonged to Mr. Williams. The state set up a board to review the evidence of the case, and looked likely to exonerate him. The Republican governor shut down the board and greenlit the execution. Last month the prosecutor's office agreed to a plea deal with Mr. Williams of life without possibility of parole, thereby cancelling the execution. The victim's family, which had come to believe in Williams's innocence, supported the agreement, as did a judge. Williams said it was not an admission of guilt, just a way of keeping him alive until his case was brought before court for a new hearing. However the state attorney general tossed it. The defence team AND the prosecutors argued the SAME SIDE before the state supreme court, but the court tossed the plea agreement, despite the original prosecutor admitting he rejected a prospective juror because he was black. The US Supreme Court refused to hear the case and now he's dead.
This is a sick and disgusting miscarriage of justice that perfectly illustrates how disgusting the death penalty is -- and how it's the sharp end of a legal system that prioritizes violence, hatred and retribution against those who fall under its shadow.
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: Good! I like to see this!
item.description: The following charges were filed: Disrupting public service — by causing widespread bomb and other threats that resulted in massive disruptions to the public services in Springfield, Ohio; Making false alarms — by knowingly causing alarm in the Springfield community by continuing to repeat lies that state and local officials have said were false; Committing telecommunications harassment — by spreading claims they know to be false during the presidential debate, campaign rallies, nationally televised interviews, and social media; Committing aggravated menacing in violation — by knowingly making intimidating statements with the intent to abuse, threaten, or harass the recipients, including Trump’s threat to deport immigrants who are here legally to Venezuela, a land they have never known; Committing aggravated menacing — by knowingly causing others to falsely believe that members of Springfield's Haitian community would cause serious physical harm to the person or property of others in Springfield; and Violating the prohibition against complicity — by conspiring with one another and spreading vicious lies that caused innocent parties to be parties to their various crimes. The charges were filed in Clark County Municipal Court. https://www.news5cleveland.com/news/local-news/haitian-nonprofit-in-springfield-files-criminal-charges-against-donald-trump-jd-vance
item.dc:creator: Iblamemyparentstoo

item.title: Vet helps paralyzed puppy walk again.
item.description: This is just amazing. It was so demoralizing seeing Bunny stiff as a board, but knowing she was still all there. So glad there is a happy ending.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: In 2003, American troops seized $868.35 million worth of gold bars from a truck in Iraq. These are their photographs of their finds featuring Saddam Hussein's gold SVD
